name: Lisdie Montano Sch Trnsprtn
districts_or_customers: Lee County, FL area student transportation (door-to-door)
recent_news: Active FMCSA registration (USDOT 3936963) as intrastate FL passenger carrier; BBB file opened April 2025 with A+ rating; no reported crashes/inspections in last 24 months.
fit_notes: Small founder-led FL school transport operator (~33 buses, 33 drivers) in Lehigh Acres serving Lee County market; modest scale and SW Florida footprint align with Summit's FL tuck-in interest but founder is relatively young (2014 founding) so succession motivation may be low.

name: B M E Transit
districts_or_customers: Pittsburgh-area school transportation (not currently listed on Pittsburgh Public Schools' active carrier roster)
recent_news: No notable M&A, safety or growth news identified; not listed among the 20 active Pittsburgh Public Schools contracted carriers as of 2026.
fit_notes: Very small owner-operator (est. ~$180K revenue, 4 staff) in East Pittsburgh; sub-scale for a Summit tuck-in and not listed as a current PPS contracted carrier - likely too small/uncertain to be attractive.

name: International Bus Group Inc
recent_news: No verifiable web footprint located for 'International Bus Group Inc' at 2541 Camp Creek Pkwy, Atlanta. A Doug Dunn is the well-known founder/CEO of Alliance Bus Group (College Park, GA) - a national bus dealership, not a school bus operator; possible confusion of names/entities in source data.
fit_notes: Unable to verify this entity as an operating school bus contractor; the Doug Dunn referenced is associated with Alliance Bus Group (a bus dealership/distributor, NOT an operator and not a tuck-in target). Recommend removing or further validating before treating as a Summit target.

name: Atlantic City Bus Line Excrsn
recent_news: No active web presence found for 'Atlantic City Bus Line Excursion' at 7321 Castor Ave, Philadelphia; that address is currently a Wings To Go restaurant, suggesting the bus operator (if it ever existed there) is likely defunct or relocated.
fit_notes: Name suggests Atlantic City casino excursion/charter operation, not a school bus contractor; address now occupied by a restaurant. Likely defunct or mis-categorized as student transportation - NOT a viable Summit tuck-in target.

name: Byberry North Bus Ctr
recent_news: 15000 E Roosevelt Blvd in Somerton/Northeast Philadelphia is the site of the former Philadelphia State Hospital, redeveloped (permits 2023) by Rockefeller Group into the 656,904 sq ft 'Byberry North Business Center' / Rockefeller Group Logistics Center - an industrial/logistics campus, not a school bus depot.
fit_notes: Not an operating school bus contractor - 'Byberry North Business Center' is a Rockefeller Group industrial logistics development at the old Philadelphia State Hospital site. Mis-categorized as student transport; NOT a Summit tuck-in target.
